---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, workflow improvement, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the pain point or gap.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work.

## Which part of the system?

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Existing skill improvement
- [ ] Workflow (`repo/`)
- [ ] Agent configuration
- [ ] Templates or examples
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, example scenarios, market context, etc.
